title: WorkshopLM product film v5
creativeDirection: Apple product demo restraint with Screen Studio-style focus choreography: real product first, smooth focus moves, exact evidence, beat-led output payoff.
centralClaim: WorkshopLM turns one messy source into approved, source-traceable professional work without losing the thinking behind it.

music.title: Different Window
music.processing: Untouched stereo master with gain automation only.

acts.text: Why does good work fall apart after the meeting? Notes, decisions, slides, visuals, and sources split across tools. Workshop L M starts with the real material—voice, notes, a website, or a document—and keeps it together inside one local Workshop.

GPT-5.6 Terra turns that material into an editable Map. Evidence becomes synthesis, then one recommended direction. Open any claim and you see the exact sentence behind it. Change the evidence, and affected work is marked for review.

Human control is built into the flow. Approve the Brief before creating downstream work. Approve the Storyboard before rendering Video. Then one decision becomes a presentation, infographic, images, audio overview, sketch, storyboard, and editable PowerPoint—with one Style and one source trail.

The Storyboard stays editable panel by panel: image, narration, timing, and source. After approval, HyperFrames renders the video locally and records the claim, image, narration, and source hashes behind every scene.

Codex with GPT-5.6 built and tested Workshop L M. Inside the product, GPT-5.6 Terra creates the grounded Map you just saw. One authorized conversation became all of this professional work, with every claim still connected to its source.

sections.label: One source. One chain of work.
Open any claim to its exact Source
